ab: maki qutux tnaqan muw mqwas Lesa lalu nya, mungi balay krryax.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Lesa，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Lesa, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: trang samiy mqwas ga, si gryax ksyuw ’enpit, ssom ru biru brwan.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: minnxal, minsazing, mincyugal, ga ksyugan nha ha.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: ana ga yaqih gaga nya, ksyuw ga ini nya kbzihiy kruma.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: pucing nya ini swayal ksyuw kwara la.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: maki qutux ryax, mgluw samiy musa lmosay.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: maki myan ska pknyun, sulu musa tanux qu Lesa, ana ga ini aras rbal ssom.
ch: 路途中，Lesa想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Lesa wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: aki ksyuw rbal ssom, ana ga kmal kwara mha, ini samiy aras uziy.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: memaw mngilis Lesa. t’uqu kmal mha, swa simuw ini saku ksyugiy rbal ssom kwara!
ch: Lesa急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!!
en: Lesa burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: kyalun ni tnaqan mqwas, swa su ini aras nanak, kryax ksyugan misu qeqaya ga, ini su bzihiy uziy.
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: kinsuxal nya mqwas biru lga, mziboq balay tehuk pqwasan qu Lesa, kwara kinsyugan nya qeqaya ga wal nya bzihan tnaqan mqwas kwara la.
ch: 隔天上學，Lesa很早就到學校了，Lesa把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Lesa arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: mkura squ tnaqan mqwas tmatuk tunux, kmal mha aring sqaniy lga aras saku nanak la, ru mhway simuw balay pksyugan saku raral mha.
ch: Lesa向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Lesa apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
